headline: Dollar Tree invests to improve customer shopping experience
summary: Dollar Tree, the discount retailer that has been a go-to for people, especially for themed decorations, has been working vigorously to bring customers back to the store. Some of the restructuring has involved introducing more price variations for bundled items and revamping how products are placed ...
